attacking_style: Launches solo attacks from established breakaway groups, willing to go alone early rather than wait for finale. Shows exceptional time-trialing strength to sustain solo efforts against organized chases.
team_tactics: Insufficient data - observed in breakaway scenarios without visible team support or lead-out positioning.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling terrain where time-trialing power can be maximized. Strong rouleur profile suited to sustained solo efforts rather than explosive climbing.
vulnerability: Relies on hesitation and lack of cooperation in chase groups behind; organized chases with committed cooperation may neutralize his solo efforts despite strong TT abilities.
key_patterns: Attacks solo from within established breakaways rather than waiting for group sprint finish.
Sustains extended solo advantages through superior time-trialing and rouleur strength against larger groups.
Exploits tactical hesitation and poor cooperation in chase groups to maintain gaps.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from 2019 insufficient to determine trajectory or recent form
